qry:select.name: REPORT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT EV.c_evento as EV_c_evento, EV.d_evento as EV_d_evento, EV.f_desde as EV_f_desde, EV.f_desde as EV_f_hasta, EV.o_evento as EV_o_evento, EV.d_cus1 as EV_a, EV.d_cus2 as EV_d_cus2, EV.d_cus3 as EV_d_cus3, EV.d_cus4 as EV_d_cus4, EV.d_cus5 as EV_d_cus5, EV.oi_escala, E.oi_evaluacion, E.c_estado, E.o_evaluado, E.o_evaluador, E.f_evaluacion, E.n_resultado, E.d_cus1, E.d_cus2, E.d_cus3, E.d_cus4, E.d_cus5,
LE.codemp as E_codemp, LE.empresa as E_empresa, LE.fingreso as E_fingreso, LE.foto as E_foto, LE.legajo as E_legajo, LE.nombre as E_nombre, LU.d_unidad_org as E_unidad, LP.d_posicion as E_posicion,
EE.codemp as J_codemp, EE.empresa as J_empresa, EE.fingreso as J_fingreso, EE.legajo as J_legajo, EE.nombre as J_nombre, EU.d_unidad_org as J_unidad, EP.d_posicion as J_posicion,
SE.codemp as S_codemp, SE.empresa as S_empresa, SE.fingreso as S_fingreso, SE.legajo as S_legajo, SE.nombre as S_nombre, SU.d_unidad_org as S_unidad, SP.d_posicion as S_posicion
FROM EDD02_EVENTOS as EV, EDD03_EVALUACION as E,
ORG01_UNI_ORG as LU, ORG01_UNI_ORG as EU, ORG01_UNI_ORG as SU,
ORG04_POSICIONES as LP, ORG04_POSICIONES as EP, ORG04_POSICIONES as SP,
(select L1.oi_empresa as oi_empresa, E1.c_empresa as codemp, E1.d_empresa as empresa, L1.oi_personal_emp as oi_personal_emp, L1.f_ingreso as fingreso, L1.e_numero_legajo as legajo, H1.d_ape_y_nom as nombre, H1.oi_foto as foto from PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as L1, ORG03_EMPRESAS as E1, PER01_PERSONAL as H1 join E1.oi_empresa inner L1.oi_empresa, L1.oi_personal inner H1.oi_personal) as LE,
(select L1.oi_empresa as oi_empresa, E1.c_empresa as codemp, E1.d_empresa as empresa, L1.oi_personal_emp as oi_personal_emp, L1.f_ingreso as fingreso, L1.e_numero_legajo as legajo, H1.d_ape_y_nom as nombre, H1.oi_foto as foto from PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as L1, ORG03_EMPRESAS as E1, PER01_PERSONAL as H1 join E1.oi_empresa inner L1.oi_empresa, L1.oi_personal inner H1.oi_personal) as EE,
(select L1.oi_empresa as oi_empresa, E1.c_empresa as codemp, E1.d_empresa as empresa, L1.oi_personal_emp as oi_personal_emp, L1.f_ingreso as fingreso, L1.e_numero_legajo as legajo, H1.d_ape_y_nom as nombre, H1.oi_foto as foto from PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as L1, ORG03_EMPRESAS as E1, PER01_PERSONAL as H1 join E1.oi_empresa inner L1.oi_empresa, L1.oi_personal inner H1.oi_personal) as SE
join EV.oi_evento inner E.oi_evento, E.oi_personal_emp inner LE.oi_personal_emp, E.oi_evaluador inner EE.oi_personal_emp, E.oi_supervisor left outer SE.oi_personal_emp, E.oi_uni_evaluado left outer LU.oi_unidad_org, E.oi_uni_evaluador left outer EU.oi_unidad_org, E.oi_uni_supervisor left outer SU.oi_unidad_org, E.oi_pos_evaluado left outer LP.oi_posicion, E.oi_pos_evaluador left outer EP.oi_posicion, E.oi_pos_supervisor left outer SP.oi_posicion
WHERE E.oi_evaluacion={#SOURCE:@oi_evaluacion} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: REPORT_PREVIEW
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT TV.oi_tipo_eval, TV.oi_escala FROM EDD01_TIPOS_EVAL as TV WHERE TV.oi_tipo_eval={#SOURCE:@oi_tipo_eval} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: PLANTILLAS
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select EVA.oi_plantilla, EVA.n_ponderacion as EVA_n_ponderacion, EVA.n_resultado as EVA_n_resultado, EVA.o_plantilla as EVA_o_plantilla, EVA.d_cus1 as EVA_d_cus1, EVA.d_cus2 as EVA_d_cus2, EVA.d_cus3 as EVA_d_cus3, EVA.d_cus4 as EVA_d_cus4, EVA.d_cus5 as EVA_d_cus5, EVE.n_ponderacion as EVE_n_ponderacion, EVE.oi_escala, EVE.d_cus1 as EVE_d_cus1, EVE.d_cus2 as EVE_d_cus2, EVE.d_cus3 as EVE_d_cus3, EVE.d_cus4 as EVE_d_cus4, EVE.d_cus5 as EVE_d_cus5, DEF.d_reporte as DEF_d_reporte, DEF.c_plantilla as DEF_c_plantilla, DEF.d_plantilla as DEF_d_plantilla, DEF.o_plantilla as DEF_o_plantilla, DEF.l_mostrar_res as DEF_l_mostrar_res, DEF.n_ponderacion as DEF_n_ponderacion, DEF.d_cus1 as DEF_d_cus1, DEF.d_cus2 as DEF_d_cus2, DEF.d_cus3 as DEF_d_cus3, DEF.d_cus4 as DEF_d_cus4, DEF.d_cus5 as DEF_d_cus5, DEF.e_orden from EDD03_PLANTILLAS as EVA, EDD02_PLANTILLAS as EVE, EDD01_PLANTILLAS as DEF where EVA.oi_plantilla_eve=EVE.oi_plantilla and EVE.oi_plantilla_def=DEF.oi_plantilla and EVA.oi_evaluacion={#SOURCE:@oi_evaluacion} order by e_orden asc, oi_plantilla asc
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: PLANTILLAS_PREVIEW
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select DEF.oi_plantilla, DEF.oi_escala, DEF.d_reporte as DEF_d_reporte, DEF.c_plantilla as DEF_c_plantilla, DEF.d_plantilla as DEF_d_plantilla, DEF.o_plantilla as DEF_o_plantilla, DEF.l_mostrar_res as DEF_l_mostrar_res, DEF.n_ponderacion as DEF_n_ponderacion, DEF.d_cus1 as DEF_d_cus1, DEF.d_cus2 as DEF_d_cus2, DEF.d_cus3 as DEF_d_cus3, DEF.d_cus4 as DEF_d_cus4, DEF.d_cus5 as DEF_d_cus5, DEF.e_orden from EDD01_PLANTILLAS as DEF where DEF.oi_tipo_eval={#SOURCE:@oi_tipo_eval} order by e_orden asc, oi_plantilla asc
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: OBJETIVOS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select OBJ.oi_objetivo, OBJ.c_objetivo, OBJ.d_objetivo, OBJ.oi_escala, OBJ.n_ponderacion, OBJ.n_resultado, OBJ.o_objetivo, OBJ.d_cus1, OBJ.d_cus2, OBJ.d_cus3, OBJ.d_cus4, OBJ.d_cus5 from EDD03_OBJETIVOS as OBJ where OBJ.oi_plantilla={#SOURCE:@oi_plantilla} order by oi_objetivo ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SUBOBJETIVOS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select SUB.oi_subobjetivo, SUB.c_subobjetivo, SUB.d_subobjetivo, SUB.o_subobjetivo, SUB.oi_escala, SUB.n_ponderacion, SUB.d_cus1, SUB.d_cus2, SUB.d_cus3, SUB.d_cus4, SUB.d_cus5 from EDD03_SUBOBJETIVOS as SUB where SUB.oi_objetivo={#SOURCE:@oi_objetivo} order by oi_subobjetivo ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ESCALA_QRY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select ESC.oi_escala as oi_escala, ESC.c_escala as c_escala, ESC.d_escala as d_escala, min(VAL.n_val_desde) as ESC_min_val, max(VAL.n_val_hasta) as ESC_max_val from org29_escalas as ESC, org29_val_escalas as VAL where ESC.oi_escala=VAL.oi_escala and ESC.oi_escala={#SOURCE:@oi_escala} group by ESC.oi_escala, ESC.c_escala, ESC.d_escala ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: VALORES
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select V.oi_val_escala, V.c_valor, V.d_valor, V.n_val_desde, V.n_val_hasta from org29_val_escalas as V where V.oi_escala={#SOURCE:@oi_escala} order by n_val_desde ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

OPT.text: Items Escala Fija con Comentarios- Permite Agregar/Eliminar
